title: Eulobus sceptrostigma
taxonomy: Eulobus sceptrostigma is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is native to the southwestern United States. It is often referred to as the Siskiyou Mariposa Tulip or Siskiyou Mariposa. The Eulobus sceptrostigma is a perennial plant that grows in a variety of environments. It is a member of the Eulobus genus, which is closely related to the genus Calochortus.

properties: Eulobus sceptrostigma, also known as Sceptre Flower, has been used in traditional medicine for its various therapeutic properties. Its roots and stems are rich in saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects.
